Beach

Mary McLeod Bethune Beach Park

A quieter south beach access with oceanfront space and lagoon-side options nearby.

Location

New Smyrna Beach, FL

Best time

Weekday mornings for a calmer visit.

Parking

Public parking with beach access.

Photo tip

Bring a longer lens for shorebirds and soft wave detail.

Photo gallery

Plan this stop

Duration: 1-2 hr

Coordinates: 28.9418, -80.8384

Hidden Explorer Guide helps travelers discover authentic places through local photography and guides.
